name: Feludar Goyendagiri
overview: In the exquisite but bloodied snowscape of Kashmir, Feluda, Topshe, and Jatayu encounter a chilling mystery as a retired judge is murdered. Now Feluda has to navigate multiple suspects and political tension to uncover the truth.
